Bindings.Binding: -- Drive through the protected driver if available; SetAttribute -- is allowed in combat for SecureFrameTemplate. Otherwise fall -- back to the direct Lua path (works in OOC and on clean -- binding sources, fails gracefully through the pcall in Omni: -- Toggle when the binding is tainted). if OmniInventory._combatToggleDriver then OmniInventory._combatToggleDriver:SetAttribute("omni_req", 1) else OmniInventory:Toggle() end

if OmniInventory.PhysicalSort and OmniInventory.PhysicalSort.Sort then OmniInventory.PhysicalSort:Sort({ consolidateStacks = true, routeSpecialized = true }) elseif OmniInventory.Frame and OmniInventory.Frame.PhysicalSortBags then OmniInventory.Frame:PhysicalSortBags() end
if OmniInventoryFrame and OmniInventoryFrame.searchBox then OmniInventoryFrame.searchBox:SetText("") OmniInventoryFrame.searchBox:ClearFocus() end
